input:
"#CONTEXT#
You are a B2B sales strategist writing a GTM intelligence memo for a sales team. You will receive information about:
1. A client company whose product is being sold
2. A lead who previously worked at a company that is a known customer of the client
3. The lead's current company where they now hold a relevant role

The lead's past company is a known customer of the client. The lead held a relevant role there and would have been exposed to or aware of the client's product. They have since moved to a new company in a similar or more senior role."

"#INPUTS#
client_company_name: Nostra
client_company_domain: nostra.ai
client_company_description: Nostra helps the world’s leading ecommerce brands future-proof their digital infrastructure with cutting-edge edge technology. We enable high-growth DTC companies to deploy enterprise-grade infrastructure in minutes, not months. Our edge platform is designed to accelerate site speed, increase conversion rates, and drive more revenue, while protecting your brand from modern threats. With products like Edge Delivery Engine, Edge Protection, Edge ID, and Edge Crawler, we give brands the tools to: • Boost performance by 20–30% • Block ad bot traffic before it hits your site • Extend cookie life for better attribution • Optimize content for LLM indexing and AI-native search Brands like Jolie, Amiri, and Olukai rely on Nostra to deliver faster, safer, smarter ecommerce experiences

lead_full_name: 
lead_linkedin_url: Linda Tran
lead_current_job_title: https://www.linkedin.com/in/linda-tran33
lead_current_company_name: Vice President of Ecommerce
lead_current_company_domain: Z Supply
lead_current_company_description: zsupplyclothing.com

lead_past_company_name: Z SUPPLY’s story begins in 2013 with the idea that simplicity, comfort and style should coexist in every closet. What started with a thoughtfully designed pocket tee has expanded into a line of timeless fashion essentials featuring signature soft fabrications, classic silhouettes and versatile styles that can be worn by everyone, everyday. 
 
As a female-led brand, we strive to empower women through fashion and work to be a force for good in the global community. With the ethos that we are all in this together, each year Z SUPPLY implements programs that give back to important organizations that are near and dear to the hearts of our entire team, including The Exodus Road, Breast Cancer Angels, Keep-A-Breast Foundation, and Court Appointed Special Advocates (CASA).
 
Innovation continues to be key, which has led us to expand from our Everyday Essentials line adding must-have fashion pieces into every collection, as well as cozy loungewear in Z Lounge, and a line of matching styles for girls 7-14. 
 
We continue to grow with our community of Z SUPPLY women, and designing timeless styles for every woman, no matter her age, size or shape. Because classic fashion is always in style.
lead_past_company_domain: Forever 21
lead_past_company_description: forever21.com
lead_past_company_job_title: Forever 21 continues to be a fashion industry leader with a mission to make the latest trends accessible to all. F21 persists on staying ahead of innovation and providing styles and fit that our customers love. While reinventing for now and beyond, we’re seeking passionate and creative new family members to join us on this adventure! F21 continues to operate E-commerce and 450 locations across the U.S. along with maintaining a strong brand DNA with consumers and within the fashion industry. 

In February 2020, Forever 21 came under new ownership made up of Simon Property Group, Brookfield Property Partners, and Authentic Brands Group. Under this new ownership F21 has the financial strength and long term view that will prepare us for the future, while continuing to set the same high standards as it always has. Join our team and learn the inner sanctum of the global fashion industry, while we build the new Forever 21! 

Forever 21 is operated by SPARC Group LLC.
 
About SPARC Group LLC
SPARC Group LLC offers operational and strategic expertise including retail and e-commerce management, sourcing, design and technology for leading global brands. SPARC Group is a joint venture between Simon Property Group, a preeminent retail real estate company and Authentic Brands Group, a global leader in brand development. In addition to Forever 21, SPARC Group brands include Aéropostale, Brooks Brothers, Nautica, Eddie Bauer, and Lucky Brand.
 
SPARC Group LLC is an equal opportunity employer, and is committed to maintaining a workplace free from prohibited employment conduct, including discrimination or harassment on the basis of race, color, national origin, sex, age, religion, disability, genetic information, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, marital status, domestic partner status, civil partnership, status as a covered veteran, status in the Uniformed Services of the United States, citizenship and any other characteristic protected by law."

"#OBJECTIVE#
Generate a 5-section GTM strategy memo that helps a sales rep understand why this lead is a high-value target right now and exactly how to approach them.

#RESEARCH DIRECTIVES#
Before writing the memo, research the following:

1. **Current company business context** — What is the current company's scale, market position, ecommerce footprint, and growth trajectory? What operational or technical challenges would a company like this face? What about their stage creates urgency for the client's product?

2. **Competitive landscape** — Who are the current company's direct competitors? What market pressure do they face? How does site performance, conversion optimization, or digital infrastructure factor into their competitive position?

3. **Lead's role and authority** — Based on their title and the company context, what does this person own? What decisions do they influence or control? Why are they the right person to talk to about the client's product?

4. **The alumni signal** — The lead previously held a relevant role at a company that uses the client's product. What would they have seen or experienced there? How does that experience translate to their current situation?

5. **Complexity delta** — How do the challenges at the current company compare to the past company? Are they dealing with more brands, more SKUs, more markets, more traffic, more complexity? Frame the current situation relative to what they've already navigated.

#OUTPUT FORMAT#
Write a 5-section memo in sharp, conversational prose. No bullet points. No headers beyond the section names. Each section should be a tight paragraph.

**OVERVIEW**
2-3 sentences. Who is this person, what is their current role, and what is their connection to the client's customer base. State the alumni signal clearly.

**MARKET POSITION**
One paragraph. The current company's business context — scale, growth stage, competitive pressure, and why their digital infrastructure matters right now. What is at stake for them?

**RELEVANCE & READINESS**
One paragraph. Why this specific person. What did they see or own at their past company? What do they own now? Why would they recognize the value of the client's product immediately?

**RECOMMENDED APPROACH**
One paragraph. The specific angle for outreach. Include a sample message or talk track that references the alumni connection and speaks to the current company's situation. Make it concrete, not generic.

**TAKEAWAY**
One sentence. The verdict — why this lead matters and the urgency level.

#STYLE GUIDANCE#
- Be direct and specific. No filler, no hedge words.
- Do not fabricate metrics, quotes, or claims. Only infer plausibly from the inputs and your research.
- Do not claim the lead directly used or implemented the client's product unless you have evidence. Frame it as exposure and awareness based on their role.
- The memo should read like it was written by someone who understands the market, not by an AI summarizing inputs.
- Total length: 300-400 words.

Output Schema
json{
  ""overview"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""2-3 sentences. Who is this person, their current role, and their alumni connection to the client's customer base.""
  },
  ""market_position"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""One paragraph on the current company's business context, competitive pressure, and why digital infrastructure matters now.""
  },
  ""relevance_and_readiness"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""One paragraph on why this specific person — what they saw at the past company, what they own now, why they'd recognize value immediately.""
  },
  ""recommended_approach"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""One paragraph with the specific outreach angle and sample messaging that references the alumni connection.""
  },
  ""takeaway"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""One sentence verdict on why this lead matters and urgency level.""
  }
}"

overview.current_role: Vice President of Ecommerce at Z SUPPLY
overview.connection_summary: Linda Tran previously held a senior merchant leadership role at Forever 21, which is a documented customer of Nostra. This experience means she was likely exposed to Nostra's performance improvements and results, such as accelerated page loads and increased crawl speed. This 'alumni signal' positions her as a high-probability champion for a discussion about website speed and SEO in her current role at Z SUPPLY.

market_position.company_scale: Z SUPPLY is a mid-market, fast-growing women's lifestyle brand with significant scale. A report from late 2024 noted that the company has surpassed $100 million in revenue. Other data sources estimate its annual revenue between $25M and $50M with 51-200 employees. The company has a sophisticated growth stack, utilizing technologies like Dynamic Yield, Klaviyo, and Cloudflare, indicating a mature approach to its digital operations.
market_position.competitive_pressure: Z SUPPLY operates in a highly crowded and trend-driven market segment. Its direct competitive set includes major lifestyle and fashion retailers such as Free People, Anthropologie, Evereve, REVOLVE, and Shopbop. In this environment, gaining an edge in customer experience and online visibility is crucial, creating intense pressure to optimize every aspect of the digital funnel.
market_position.infrastructure_importance: Digital infrastructure and site performance are critical for Z SUPPLY's revenue and growth. The company manages a complex digital footprint, blending a significant wholesale business with an increasingly vital direct-to-consumer (DTC) channel on Shopify, in addition to its own digital wholesale platform, shopB2Z.com. This complexity creates challenges, especially with 'peak-load moments around launches'. For Z SUPPLY, superior site performance, measured in milliseconds, directly impacts conversion rates, SEO visibility (organic rank), and the efficiency of paid marketing efforts. In their competitive category, faster page loads and effective bot mitigation are not just technical metrics but are directly tied to generating incremental revenue and improving profitability.

relevance_and_readiness.past_role_experience: In her previous role as a Senior Merchant at Forever 21, a documented Nostra customer, Linda Tran would have been exposed to the challenges of maintaining high website performance for a major e-commerce brand. She would have been aware of the impact of site speed and crawler efficiency on sales and product visibility. The context suggests she would have witnessed Nostra's edge acceleration and crawler optimization initiatives and their direct impact on business metrics, experiencing firsthand how technical improvements in areas like page load times and crawl throughput translate into commercial success.
relevance_and_readiness.past_company_results: Nostra's implementation at Forever 21 yielded significant, documented improvements. According to a success story, Nostra's Edge Delivery Engine™ and Crawler Optimization solutions led to a 166% increase in crawl speed, a 59% acceleration in page load times, and a 53% reduction in Time to First Byte (TTFB). These technical gains resulted in 'Core Web Vitals going greener' and a boost in organic traffic, outcomes that Linda Tran would have likely observed during her tenure.
relevance_and_readiness.current_role_ownership: As the Vice President of Ecommerce at Z SUPPLY, Linda Tran is directly responsible for the key performance metrics that Nostra's solutions are designed to enhance. Her ownership extends to site performance, Core Web Vitals, crawl efficiency for SEO, the speed of Product Detail Pages (PDPs) and Product Listing Pages (PLPs), bot mitigation to protect ad spend and site resources, and the quality of attribution signals for marketing effectiveness. These are the precise levers that Nostra's platform amplifies.
relevance_and_readiness.value_proposition_fit: Linda Tran is perfectly positioned to understand and champion Nostra's value proposition because of her unique combination of past experience and current authority. Having witnessed the tangible benefits of Nostra's technology at a large-scale retailer like Forever 21, she can immediately recognize its potential for Z SUPPLY. Now in a senior leadership role at a company operating on Shopify with a leaner team, the prospect of achieving similar gains—such as 20-30% faster PLP/PDP speeds—quickly and without a complex replatforming project is highly compelling. Nostra's proven compatibility with Shopify and its edge-first deployment model lower the implementation risk, making it an attractive solution for a VP focused on driving rapid, measurable results.

recommended_approach.outreach_angle: Lead with an alumni-win, Shopify-native speed and SEO angle that is tied to a proposed A/B pilot on high-intent product templates.
recommended_approach.sample_message_hook: Linda — at Forever 21 your team partnered with Nostra’s Edge Delivery Engine and Crawler Optimization to cut TTFB and accelerate page loads while improving crawl coverage.
recommended_approach.key_talking_point: Z SUPPLY’s DTC is scaling on Shopify alongside shopB2Z and seasonal launches; we can drop in at the edge to speed up PLP/PDP by 20–30%, block ad-bot traffic before it hits your site, and expand your crawl budget — all without a code freeze or replatform.
recommended_approach.call_to_action: Propose a 2-week test on two collections ahead of Spring, with success defined by greener Core Web Vitals, lower bounce rates, and more organic entries. Ask for 30 minutes to scope a low-lift rollout.

takeaway.justification: Linda Tran is a high-urgency target because she is a VP-level buyer with direct exposure to Nostra's value from her time at Forever 21. She is now scaling a Shopify-led DTC business (Z SUPPLY) in a speed-sensitive category where Nostra's edge acceleration and crawler optimization can provide immediate and significant ROI.
